title: User
description: User profile, birth data (for synastry), and stable preferences. Birth data is sensitive: encrypted at rest, redacted in telemetry, deletable on demand.

birth_data.description: Sensitive. Required for genuine synastry; age alone yields nothing.

encrypted.description: True when stored encrypted at rest.

synastry.description: Assistant chart x user chart; stable relational chemistry. Feeds the canon's stance-toward-user and shifts baseline warmth.

purpose.description: What the companion is for (mentor, listener, friend, analyst, motivator); set at onboarding, shapes the scoring function.
